title: Annoying Pillagers
description: Find those pillagers hiding in your base
body:
# Find those pillagers hiding in your base
- craft a goat horn using a spectral arrow and an ominous bottle to obtain a raid horn, so you can find those pillagers that hide in the most hidden places of your base.
- you can also add armor trims to your horns for further customization.

[![<Sparked Host>](<https://i.imgur.com/6DVHtNL.png>)](<https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3123>)
